revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Amakashinimasu-jinja]][[ja:甘樫坐神社]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Amakashi-ni-imasu Shrine | native_name = 甘樫坐神社 | image = 明日香村豊浦 甘樫坐神社 Amakashi-ni-masu-jinja 2012.4.12 - panoramio.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Amakashi-ni-imasu Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.481901|135.812359}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Empress Suiko|lt=Suiko|ar|الإمبراطورة سويكو|ast|Emperatriz Suiko|azb|امپراتریس سویکو|bcl|Emperatris Suiko|be|Імператрыца Суйка|ca|Suiko|ckb|ئیمپراتۆر سویکۆ|cs|Suiko|de|Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|es|Suiko Tennō|eu|Suiko|fa|امپراتریس سوئیکو|fi|Suiko|fr|Suiko|hak|Suiko Thiên-fòng|he|סויקו, קיסרית יפן|hu|Szuiko japán császárnő|id|Suiko|it|Suiko|ja|推古天皇|ka|სუიკო|ko|스이코 천황|la|Suiko (imperatrix)|nl|Suiko|pl|Suiko|pt|Suiko|ru|Императрица Суйко|sh|Carica Suiko|simple|Empress Suiko|sl|Cesarica Suiko|sv|Suiko|ta|பேரரசி சுய்கோ|th|จักรพรรดินีซูอิโกะ|tl|Emperatris Suiko|tr|Suiko (imparatoriçe)|uk|Імператор Суйко|uz|Imperator Suiko|vi|Thiên hoàng Suiko|zh_classical|推古天皇|zh_min_nan|Suiko Thian-hông|zh_yue|推古天皇|zh|推古天皇|qid=Q298057|1=Empress Suiko}} }} {{nihongo|'''Amakashi-ni-imasu Shrine'''|甘樫坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|lt=Shikinai Taisha|en|Shikinai Taisha|ja|式内大社|simple|Shikinai Taisha|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai and Ainame-sai offerings|lt=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai and Ainame-sai offerings|qid=Q135009157|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai and Ainame-sai offerings}} * {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|ja|大和国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} ** Series ordinal: 161 ** P155: {{ill|Asukanoyamakuchino Shrine|lt=Asukanoyamakuchino Shrine|qid=Q135098850|1=Asukanoyamakuchino Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Inashironimasu Shrine|lt=Inashironimasu Shrine|ja|稲代坐神社|qid=Q43594637|1=Inashiro-ni-masu Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Asuka, Nara|lt=Asuka|ar|أسوكا (نارا)|ceb|Asuka-mura|de|Asuka (Nara)|en|Asuka, Nara|es|Asuka (Nara)|fa|آسوکا، نارا|fr|Asuka (Nara)|hy|Ասուկա (Նարա)|id|Asuka, Nara|it|Asuka (Giappone)|ja|明日香村|ko|아스카촌|pl|Asuka (miejscowość)|ro|Asuka, Nara|ru|Асука (село)|tl|Asuka, == name in kana (P1814) == * アマカシ- == TripAdvisor ID (P3134) == * 8820620 == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 9150005004857 == Commons category (P373) == * Amakashinimasu-jinja == has part(s) (P527) == * {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|qid=Q135018062|1=Engishiki seat}} ** P1114: {'amount': '+4', 'unit': '1'} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県高市郡明日香村大字豊浦字寺内626', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '奈良県高市郡明日香村豊浦', 'language': 'ja'} == located in/on physical feature (P706) == * {{ill|Amakashi-no-Oka|lt=Amakashi-no-Oka|ja|甘樫丘|qid=Q11574286|1=Amakashi-no-Oka}} {{commons category|Category:Amakashinimasu-jinja}} [[JA:甘樫坐神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11574285}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Amakashinimasu Shrine |Image = [[File:Amakashinimasu-jinja.jpg|270px|Amakashinimasu Shrine (Kashihara City)]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takaichi District|Q1117901|qid=Q1117901|1=Takaichi District, Nara}}{{ill|lt=Asuka Village|Q752397|qid=Q752397|1=Asuka, Nara}} 626 Terauchi, Ōaza Toyoura | Latitude degrees = 34 | Latitude minutes = 28 | Latitude seconds = 54.9 | N/S = N | Longitude degrees = 135 | Longitude minutes = 48 | Longitude seconds = 44.3 | E/W = E | Map country code = JP | Deity = {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|qid=Q298057|1=Empress Suiko}} | Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (Major)
Former {{ill|lt=Village Shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} | Founded = Unknown | Main hall style = {{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|qid=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} | Festival = {{ill|lt=September 18|Q2893|qid=Q2893|1=September 18}} | Ritual = {{ill|lt=Kugatachi|Q11581453|qid=Q11581453|1=Kuchiyose}} ritual | Map = Japan Nara }} **Amakashinimasu Shrine** (あまかしにますじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located on {{ill|lt=Amakashi Hill|Q11574286|qid=Q11574286|1=Amakashi-no-Oka}} in {{ill|lt=Asuka Village|Q752397|qid=Q752397|1=Asuka, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Takaichi District|Q1117901|qid=Q1117901|1=Takaichi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha (major shrine)|Q134917288|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|qid=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was that of a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|qid=Q298057|1=Empress Suiko}} is enshrined as the principal deity. The subsidiary shrines enshrine {{ill|lt=Hachiman Shrine|Q11390939|qid=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kasuga Daimyōjin|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|qid=Q455602}}, {{ill|lt=Yatagarasu|Q11568925|qid=Q11568925|1=Kumano Gongen}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sumiyoshi Daimyōjin|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|lt=Kumano Gongen|Q11568925|qid=Q11568925|1=Kumano Gongen}}. According to the *Gogun Jinja-ki*, the deities were {{ill|lt=Magatsuhinokami|Q11591203|qid=Q11591203|lt=Yasomagatsuhinokami and Ōmagatsuhinokami|1=Magatsuhi-no-kami}} and {{ill|lt=Naobinomikami|Q11581794|qid=Q11581794|lt=Kamunaobi no Kami and Ōnaobi no Kami|1=Ōnaobi no Kami}}, which are believed to have been the original enshrined deities. Empress Suiko came to be worshipped as the principal deity only from the Edo period onward. === History === The shrine is said to have been founded by {{ill|lt=Takenouchi no Sukune|Q1073668|qid=Q1073668|1=Takenouchi no Sukune}}. An entry dated the 27th day of the first month of Jōgan 1 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|qid=Q23897|1=859}}) in the {{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}} records that Amakashi no Kami was promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. The {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} lists it as “Amakashinimasu Shrine, four seats, Takaichi District, {{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}},” classifying it as a major shrine and noting that it received offerings at the Tsukinami, Ainame, and Niiname festivals. === Rituals === [[File:Amakashinimasu-jinja2.jpg|thumb|250px|Amakashinimasu Shrine (Kugatachi)]] Amakashi Hill was, in ancient times, a place where {{ill|lt=Kugatachi|Q11581453|qid=Q11581453|1=Kuchiyose}} (ordeal by boiling water) was performed, and medieval sources such as the *Gogun Jinja-ki* describe this shrine as a “deity of hot-water divination.” In connection with this tradition, the Kugatachi ritual has been performed at the shrine since the postwar period.[http://www.bell.jp/pancho/kasihara_diary/2003_04_06.htm Viewing the Kugatachi ritual at Amakashinimasu Shrine][https://asukamura.com/experience/549/ Kugatachi] === Notes === {{Reflist}} === Related items === * {{ill|lt=Mukuhara-dera|Q11415914|qid=Q11415914|1=Kōgen-ji}} {{Shinto Navbox}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Amakashi-ni-imasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Amakashi-ni-imasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Amakashi-ni-imasu Shrine]][[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai and Ainame-sai offerings]] [[Category:Kanpei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:明日香村の歴史]] [[Category:明日香村の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]]
